old_thesis: Stock declined 25-30% YTD in 2026 amid AI concerns, with forward P/E of 12.3x reflecting skepticism. Debt-funded $25B buyback increases leverage, and 8.6% annual revenue growth forecast may not sustain premium multiple.
new_thesis: Agentforce and Data 360 ARR surged to $2.9B (+200% YoY), indicating strong AI-driven growth. Management raised FY30 revenue target to $63B (11% CAGR). Analyst consensus target of $257.03 implies 34.5% upside from current price of $191.10.
what_changed: 最近一季度（2026-04-30）EPS超预期24.0%；管理层给出6条前瞻指引，显示业务走向；公司类型已确认为GrowthSoftware，估值方法已切换至Forward PE + PEG + EV/FCF
why_now: 股价仍低于分析师共识目标价33.7%，下次财报（2026-09-02）是预期差验证的关键节点。
